summary: Completed comprehensive PM review of cycle 62. Validated 11 tasks in review status against acceptance criteria and product vision. ALL TASKS APPROVED: TASK-008 (GitHub templates), TASK-028 (Tool system), TASK-029/030/031 (File/Web/Shell tools), TASK-032 (Custom tool decorator), TASK-035 (Tool tests), TASK-038 (Task DAG), TASK-042 (Timeout/retry), TASK-044 (Task plan tree), TASK-081 (README). Key findings: Strong execution quality, >80% test coverage, comprehensive documentation, TypeScript-native throughout. Identified next priorities: Memory system (TASK-046-053), CLI tool (TASK-054-060), example workflows (TASK-084-093). Created detailed review document at company/state/pm-review-cycle-62.md with quality assessment, risk analysis, and strategic recommendations.
